title: Add fleet boundary enforcement tests
description: Implement the AST-based boundary checks that enforce fleet write centralisation, forbidden domain imports, and project-path subprocess confinement to `adapter.py`.
acceptance_criteria: `tests/fleet/test_boundaries.py` scans fleet package sources and fails on forbidden write locations outside `registry.py` and `runlog.py`.
The test suite rejects imports from `agent_takt.storage`, `agent_takt.scheduler`, `agent_takt.runner`, `agent_takt.gitutils`, `agent_takt.planner`, and `agent_takt.cli.*`.
The test suite rejects `subprocess` calls with `cwd=` outside `adapter.py`.
Boundary tests document the fleet-owned write-path invariant referenced by the spec.
